safe_claims.claim: Dense-aware controller inference has measurable CPU-side overhead over frozen prediction files.
Paper-facing fixed-substrate method rows include per-example retrieval-scoring latency diagnostics.
Supplementary cost analyses introduce no new LLM extraction calls.
safe_claims.evidence: script is read-only and does not import or call extraction providers

unsafe_claims.reason: The audit does not measure online serving, full-corpus indexing, API latency, or reader latency.

unsafe_claims.claim: The reported LLM extraction cost is an online latency benchmark.
unsafe_claims.reason: Extraction scope is a cached-input/resource disclosure, not a fresh API timing run.

unsafe_claims.claim: Dense retriever model-loading or corpus-indexing cost is included.
unsafe_claims.reason: The audit reads saved prediction files and P3 run summaries only.
